data.body:
apparently agents get stuck working from worktrees - despite the prompts telling them to use -C <repo_root>.

so now if they run a kno command on a knot and it's not found, let's say somethign like:

...<normal not found message>

note: when working from worktrees, use 'kno -C <repo_root> ...' to resolve your knot!
data.title: suggest to user to try -C <repo_root> if knot not found
